scope: OpenClaude core TUI renderer parity for transcript rendering, message orchestration, structured content, diffs, markdown, and raw Ink repaint behavior.

requiredBehaviors: preserve OpenClaude transcript search state and visible match positioning
preserve jump navigation across search matches and message cursor targets
preserve sticky prompt tracking while the visible transcript window changes
preserve hover and click expansion controls for transcript rows
preserve cursor/message-action navigation hooks
preserve warm search indexing instead of recomputing every render
preserve OpenClaude message normalization before render dispatch
preserve message grouping and render caps
preserve truncation controls for long transcript content
preserve unseen dividers and logo/status placement behavior
preserve expandable row state and message cursor state
preserve thinking block handling in list orchestration
preserve search text extraction for all rendered message shapes
preserve assistant thinking block rendering
preserve redacted thinking block rendering
preserve assistant tool-use block rendering
preserve attachment and user image message rendering
preserve compact and system row rendering
preserve rich user tool result rendering
preserve user content blocks instead of flattening them to plain text
preserve image references as renderable message content
preserve bash output blocks and command messages
preserve plan messages, tool results, and attachments as distinct renderable shapes
preserve ColorDiff-backed structured diff rendering
preserve syntax and theme awareness for diff content
preserve file-content context when available
preserve cached gutter and content splitting
preserve rich fallback word-diff rendering
preserve marked-token markdown parsing behavior
preserve markdown token caching
preserve table-specific rendering
preserve settings-aware syntax highlighting controls
preserve StreamingMarkdown stable-prefix behavior
preserve incremental damage rendering rather than unconditional full-screen damage
preserve bounded repaint behavior when transcript rows update
preserve terminal cell cleanup without full-repaint bypasses
preserve renderer performance characteristics under high-frequency transcript updates
